prompt: A conceptual educational illustration showing the four pillars of machine learning: classification, regression, ranking, and clustering. Each concept visualized as a glowing geometric symbol — a decision boundary separating two point clouds (classification), a straight regression line through scattered data (regression), a ranked ordered list with relevance scores (ranking), and color-coded clusters of dots (clustering). Clean, minimalist style, dark background with subtle grid, scientific aesthetic, blueprint-like precision, muted blues and oranges, high detail. No text labels.
